chunks.content:
**Ambush** (Standard Deck, Exiles and Partisans, and Squires and Disciples)
This card appears in multiple decks: Standard Deck, Exiles and Partisans, and Squires and Disciples.
This card has multiple variants by suit:
- Bird Ambush (×6): You may ambush in any clearing. At start of battle, defender may play to deal two immediate hits, then discard. Cancel if attacker plays matching ambush.
- Fox Ambush (×3): You may only ambush in a fox clearing. At start of battle, defender may play to deal two immediate hits, then discard. Cancel if attacker plays matching ambush.
- Rabbit Ambush (×3): You may only ambush in a rabbit clearing. At start of battle, defender may play to deal two immediate hits, then discard. Cancel if attacker plays matching ambush.
- Mouse Ambush (×3): You may only ambush in a mouse clearing. At start of battle, defender may play to deal two immediate hits, then discard. Cancel if attacker plays matching ambush.
All variants: Paper (one-time use) | Cost: 0 | Total copies: 15
chunks.embed_text:

You may ambush in any clearing. At start of battle, defender may play to deal two immediate hits, then discard. Cancel if attacker plays matching ambush.

**Dominance** (Standard Deck, Exiles and Partisans, and Squires and Disciples)
This card appears in multiple decks: Standard Deck, Exiles and Partisans, and Squires and Disciples.
This card has multiple variants by suit:
- Bird Dominance (×3): If you have at least 10 points, play during Daylight and remove your score marker. You win the game if you rule two opposite corners at the start of your Birdsong. In games of four or more, as Vagabond, you may form a coalition.
- Fox Dominance (×3): If you have at least 10 points, play during Daylight and remove your score marker. You win the game if you rule three fox clearings at the start of your Birdsong. In games of four or more, as Vagabond, you may form a coalition.
- Rabbit Dominance (×3): If you have at least 10 points, play during Daylight and remove your score marker. You win the game if you rule three rabbit clearings at the start of your Birdsong. In games of four or more, as Vagabond, you may form a coalition.
- Mouse Dominance (×3): If you have at least 10 points, play during Daylight and remove your score marker. You win the game if you rule three mouse clearings at the start of your Birdsong. In games of four or more, as Vagabond, you may form a coalition.
All variants: Stone (persistent effect) | Cost: 0 | Total copies: 12
